reports.dashboardReportsSubtitle: Track performance, sentiment shifts, and NPS movement in a modern analytics view.

reports.executiveLoaderSubtitle: Analyzing KPI shifts, risk signals, and decision-ready business narrative
reports.originalCustomerCxNote: Primary base for NPS and root-cause analysis
reports.executiveNarrativeVolume: Total tweet volume analyzed: {{total}}. CX-relevant subset: {{cx}}. Brand/support messages accounted for {{brand}} tweets.
reports.executiveNarrativeSentiment: For customer-originated and original CX tweets, the sentiment mix is {{positive}}% positive, {{neutral}}% neutral, and {{negative}}% negative, producing a social NPS proxy of {{nps}}.
reports.executiveNarrativePain: The strongest pain concentration sits in after-sales service: authorized service quality, response ownership, waiting time, and perceived unfair change/service fees.
reports.executiveNarrativeProduct: Product-related negative volume is concentrated in refrigerators, washing machines, TVs, and small appliances, but customer frustration usually escalates because of service handling rather than product fault alone.
reports.executiveNarrativePositive: Positive voice is driven mostly by long product lifetime, occasional praise for service accessibility, and campaign/discount engagement.
reports.noDataSelectedPeriod: No data available for the selected period.
reports.createdReportsSubtitle: Shows how many times you created a report in this session.

sentiment.subtitle: Brand-relevant feedback with journey stage, relevance, and reference tweets
sentiment.reRunConfirm: Re-run AI enrichment for all feedback in range? This updates sentiment, journey stage, and relevance (may take several minutes). After it finishes, rebuild the CX report from Import history.
sentiment.enrichmentStarted: AI enrichment started. This may take a few minutes.
sentiment.enrichmentInProgress: AI enrichment is running. Results will refresh when it finishes.
sentiment.enrichmentFailed: AI enrichment failed. Check the selected LLM configuration.
sentiment.loadingStatsSubtitle: Reading saved positive, neutral, and negative feedback totals for the selected range

sentiment.deleteAllFailed: Failed to delete all feedback records

heatmap.title: Journey Satisfaction Heatmap
heatmap.subtitle: Satisfaction and dissatisfaction by journey stage. Green = satisfaction, red = pain areas.
heatmap.loadingSubtitle: Reading saved stage-level positive, neutral, and negative sentiment from the AI report
heatmap.noStages: No journey stages with data. Configure journey stages in Admin, upload feedback, run analysis, then click Load Heatmap.
heatmap.insight: The experience is most conversation-heavy in Usage and Purchase, with Delivery showing the weakest satisfaction balance.

nps.methodBody: We classify each 0-10 score as Promoter (9-10), Passive (7-8), or Detractor (0-6). NPS = (% Promoters - % Detractors) among responses with a valid score in the selected period.
nps.notesBody: NPS is not an average of scores. It is sensitive to sample size; interpret together with response counts. If ratings are imported on a different scale, they may be normalized or excluded—check import validation messages.

npsPage.subtitle: Net Promoter Score analysis and trends
npsPage.loadingSubtitle: Reading promoters, passives, detractors, and trend interpretation for the selected range
npsPage.noDataHint: Upload CSV files with NPS survey data to see analysis results.
npsPage.cardSubtitle: Social NPS proxy based on original customer-originated CX tweets.
npsPage.proxyExplanation: Because tweets do not contain direct NPS scores, promoters/passives/detractors are inferred from tweet sentiment.
npsPage.proxyUnavailable: NPS proxy could not be computed for this range yet. Upload more CSV feedback or widen the date range so the selected LLM can infer promoter, passive, and detractor mix.
npsPage.temporarilyUnavailable: NPS analysis is temporarily unavailable. Please retry after a moment; LLM-based inference will populate this section once data is reachable.
npsPage.noUsableResponses: No usable responses were found in this date range. Add or reprocess CSV feedback so the selected LLM can infer an NPS-style distribution.
npsPage.healthyAdvocacy: Customer advocacy is healthy in this window: promoters ({{promoters}}%) clearly outnumber detractors ({{detractors}}%). Focus on scaling what customers already appreciate.
npsPage.fragileAdvocacy: Sentiment is slightly positive but fragile. Promoters ({{promoters}}%) are only marginally ahead of detractors ({{detractors}}%), so targeted fixes in recurring complaint themes can lift loyalty quickly.
npsPage.negativeAdvocacy: Advocacy is currently negative: detractors ({{detractors}}%) are outweighing promoters ({{promoters}}%). Prioritize top pain points and service recovery actions to reverse the trend.

landing.landingDescription: Analyze data from social media, app store reviews, and NPS surveys to increase customer satisfaction and grow your business.
landing.sentimentAnalysisDesc: Automatically analyze customer feedback and detect positive/negative trends.
landing.npsAnalysisDesc: Calculate Net Promoter Score and measure customer loyalty.
landing.rootCauseAnalysisDesc: Identify the root causes of customer complaints and generate solutions.
landing.competitorAnalysisDesc: Compare with competitors and evaluate your market position.
landing.customerJourneyDesc: Map all touchpoints and optimize customer experience.
landing.detailedReportsDesc: Create comprehensive reports in PDF and Excel formats and share them.

rootCausePage.title: Root Cause Analysis
rootCausePage.subtitle: Identify common pain points from customer feedback
rootCausePage.noRootCausesHint: Import feedback via CSV, then re-run analysis to generate pain-point clusters from your company data.
rootCausePage.runningSubtitle: Analyzing negative feedback and grouping recurring issues
rootCausePage.loadingThemesSubtitle: Reading saved themes, counts, and interpretations from the database
rootCausePage.distributionSubtitle: Root-cause distribution across negative original customer tweets.

competitorPage.title: Competitor Comparison

competitorPage.noDataRangeTitle: No data in selected date range

competitorPage.noDataRangeHint: Your data is outside the selected period. Use All time or choose a range that includes your CSV dates.
